Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11261 0 0}Lately, I've been reading all these autobiographies by famous people...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}They were all so successful in life. I wonder what they were like at my age...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've been thinking about that a lot recently...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}I hate my dad! First he tells me to quit the club... Now he tells me to go study abroad![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11291 0 0}This is all his fault! Why does he keep changing his mind!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}You don't have to agree with me all the time, you know. You can tell me when I'm wrong...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems to be thinking[n]about what he said.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я дізнався про нього трохи більше сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11222 0 0}{f 5 13 11 30 108}...Somehow, you always manage to see the core of the problem.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yeah... Deep down, I know that you're right. I shouldn't say things like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems impressed by my words.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми стали значно ближчими сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11269 0 0}B-But... I've been telling you all this because it's you, {f 4 1}-kun...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}...But I was in the wrong. I'm just venting without considering your feelings... That isn't right.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems depressed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми не стали ближчими сьогодні...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11243 0 0}...Sorry. I didn't mean to have a conversation like this when I invited you here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't we get some cake? I'll treat you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Speaking of sweets, the human brain requires 20% of the glucose derived from the body's metabolism process to function properly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ми ще трохи потусувалися разом,[n]перш ніж я вирішив повернутися до гуртожитку.[n]{f 1 1}
